milestoneTitle: Phase M9.15 — Activation distributes to buttons + icons; rest state goes flat; accent flips to warm vibrant green. The activation band tightens from ~35% (rootMargin -32.5%) to ~25% (-37.5%). Panel surfaces no longer paint accent color — the unified active-highlight recipe is explicitly overridden on .dash-panel.is-activated / .learn-zone.is-activated so the big surface stays neutral (color on the whole surface read as too much). Accent now concentrates on the small interactive bits inside an activated panel: Dashboard CTAs (.dash-action-primary/learn/tools) flatten to neutral border + mild drop shadow at rest and only light up their accent border + inset ring + outer glow when a .dash-panel is in the band; Dashboard panel icons (.dash-panel-icon--*) go greyscale rgba(30,24,16,0.22) stroke with filter:none at rest and reclaim their --accent-border stroke + stacked accent drop-shadow glow when activated. Tiles / item containers inside activated panels also raise up with a coordinated shadow. The single --base-shared token at :root flips from tangerine #ff7a1a to chartreuse-lime #84cc16 so every accent across the app (buttons, icons, nav chip active, filter chip active) retunes to warm vibrant green in one line.
